days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Mist at night. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Mist and fog in the morning and at night. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Mist at first. A few light rain patches. Force 2 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
